Darren,

I need funds for WPH Corp in order to pay a Purdey invoice from Thunder Construction in the amount of $389,755.  Could I please transfer $750,000 from the WPH Corp Bear Stearns account to the WPH Corp JPMorgan account.  The balances are as follows: 
Bear Stearns               $1,017,329.55 
Merrill Lynch              $1,251,305.00 
JPMorgan                   $   223,000.00 
Thank you.

Peg
